name: Ronit Raj
title: Full Stack AI Engineer
tagline: Full Stack AI engineer who builds production systems end-to-end — from GRPO fine-tuning Qwen2.5-14B on AMD MI300X to 79%-OCR vision-language RAG pipelines.
credentials: SIH 2024 Winner · AMD AI Hackathon · Monad Blitz 4th · Co-Founder @ Garudex Labs

availability.message: Open to discussing AI/ML projects, full-stack development, or startup collaborations.

about.summary: I build AI systems that solve real problems. From training a GRPO-fine-tuned Qwen2.5-14B agent on AMD MI300X to shipping a 79%-OCR military RAG that won Smart India Hackathon 2024, I work across the full stack — model training, fine-tuning, retrieval, agents, and the production infra that makes them ship. Open-source maintainer; co-founder at Garudex Labs.

sections.title: My Journey in AI
paragraphs: I started with a simple question at IIIT Gwalior: how do you make complex systems actually work? That curiosity grew into building production AI — from military intelligence platforms to on-chain applications. Winning Smart India Hackathon 2024 with a 79%-accuracy RAG system taught me the lesson that shapes everything I build: great AI isn't fancy architectures, it's shipping systems that hold up in production.

sections.title: AI Meets Blockchain
paragraphs: I'm fascinated by systems that combine intelligence with decentralization — on-chain typing arenas on Monad, NFT-based academic credentials, AdSense for terminals settled in micropayments. The interesting work isn't AI in smart contracts; it's building trustless systems where predictions and data provenance are verifiable on-chain.

sections.title: From Hackathons to Production
paragraphs: Build fast, ship faster, iterate. Co-founding Garudex Labs taught me the gap between demo and production is where engineering happens. Whether shipping EdTech serving 50+ students or maintaining open-source tools like GitMesh, the real work is error handling, feedback loops, and making sure the system doesn't break when real users hit it.

sections.title: Technical Approach
paragraphs: PyTorch and Transformers for models. FastAPI and Next.js for delivery. Smart contracts when decentralization adds real value. As an open-source maintainer I focus on solutions other developers can read, deploy, and extend — because the best AI is the one that ships and keeps working.
